classification_rationale: Repo is ARCHIVED (gh api archived:true), 21 KB, last pushed 2025-07-15, and is one of the stale repo names explicitly flagged in the North Star tension list (afi-agents). README is a one-line stub ("This repository contains the afi-agents module for AFI Protocol"). Content is an early scaffold: a yargs CLI wrapper (cli/afi-cli.ts), demo agent personas (personas/athena_q.agent.ts), an in-memory mentor registry (registry/mentor_registry.ts), a React demo SignalValidator UI, and EMPTY schema stubs (schemas/index.ts is blank). It holds no normative artifacts and no production protocol path. The latest commit (42df3218515c) is "chore: scaffold aider config, schema, and prompt stubs" — explicitly stub-level work.
primary_purpose: A pre-archival scaffold providing agent/persona definitions plus a yargs CLI wrapper that delegates protocol commands (validate-codex, simulate-signal, invoke-validator, invoke-mentor, run-local-deploy) to sibling repos (afi-config, afi-infra, afi-core, afi-ops), with a demo React SignalValidator UI and an in-memory mentor-pairing registry.
protocol_touchpoints: USS/CPJ ingest (only as demo mock SignalData, NOT canonical USS)

contradictions.title: Demo 'signal' shape diverges from normative USS/VaultedSignalRecord
contradictions.detail: This repo's signal type is a UI demo struct (id/timestamp/source/signalType alpha|beta|anomaly/confidence%/message) with no usignal/USS v1.1, no signalId/epoch linkage, no UWR axes, no vault lifecycle. If ever revived it would conflict with afi-config/schemas/usignal/v1. Currently harmless because archived, but stale-naming ('signal'/'validator') could mislead.
contradictions.evidence: ui/SignalValidator.tsx:8-15 — "export type SignalData = { id: string; timestamp: string; source: string; signalType: 'alpha' | 'beta' | 'anomaly'; confidence: number; message: string; }"

contradictions.title: Hard-coded sibling-repo paths assume a specific monorepo/org layout
contradictions.detail: CLI and tsconfig hard-wire relative paths to afi-config/afi-core/afi-infra/afi-ops and a local bash deploy script, implying a fixed org checkout layout rather than a portable/pluggable surface. Reference-only coupling, not protocol law; archived so non-binding.
contradictions.evidence: cli/afi-cli.ts:6-8 — "import { validateCodex } from '../../afi-config/cli_utils/codex_validator'; ... import { invokePoIValidator, invokeMentorRegistry } from '../../afi-core/cli_hooks/validator_invoker';"

notable_findings.title: Repo is archived stub explicitly named in stale-repo tension list
notable_findings.evidence: gh api repos/AFI-Protocol/afi-agents archived:true, size:21, pushed_at 2025-07-15; README.md:1-3 "This repository contains the afi-agents module for AFI Protocol"
notable_findings.recommendation: Keep archived; ensure cross-repo synthesis treats 'afi-agents' as deprecated naming, not a live protocol component.

notable_findings.title: validate-codex is the only real protocol touchpoint, fully delegated to afi-config
notable_findings.recommendation: Canonical codex/USS validation lives in afi-config; this repo only wraps it. No extraction needed.

notable_findings.title: schemas/ are empty/aspirational stubs (no canonical schema content)
notable_findings.evidence: schemas/index.ts is empty; schemas/README.md "Zod-based schemas used for validating signal structures, agent behaviors, and internal protocols"
notable_findings.recommendation: No normative schema here; ignore for schema canon. afi-config remains the schema source of truth.

notable_findings.title: Mentor registry is in-memory, non-persistent, non-canonical reputation logic
notable_findings.evidence: registry/mentor_registry.ts:14-16 "const mentors: MentorMeta[] = []; const pairings: Record<string, MentorMeta> = {}; // Runtime storage (in-memory only)"
notable_findings.recommendation: Not the canonical registry/reputation surface (REGISTRIES_AND_REPUTATION.v0.1.md). Pairing influences selection only, consistent with decentralization rule that reputation must not override scoring; but it is demo-grade and archived.

notable_findings.title: Duplicated nested afi-agents/afi-agents/ directory and package.json.patch (no real package.json)
notable_findings.evidence: tree contains both registry/mentor_registry.ts and afi-agents/registry/mentor_registry.ts (duplicate); root has package.json.patch not package.json; .aider.conf.json mislabels "repo_name":"afi-core"
notable_findings.recommendation: Cosmetic scaffolding debt in an archived repo; no action beyond noting as evidence of pre-release state.

notable_findings.title: No mint/receipt/emissions, no TSSD/vault/Mongo, no replay/determinism, no BigQuery/Kafka, no contracts
notable_findings.evidence: Targeted searches over full tree (recursive) found zero hits for mongodb|MongoTSSD|vault|TSSD|VaultedSignalRecord, mintForSignal|coordinateMint|beneficiary|epoch, replay|ReplaySession|determinism, AFIMintCoordinator|AFISignalReceipt|EmissionsMinted, BigQuery|kafka|warehouse, postgresql|timescaledb|influxdb, publicSurface|proprietaryDetail. Only 'codex' appears (validate-codex command).
notable_findings.recommendation: Confirms repo holds no commitment/evidence/analytics/replay artifacts; safe to exclude from normative and replay-critical surface.

notable_findings.title: Persona config hard-codes external LLM provider (gpt-4 / augmentcode vector memory)
notable_findings.recommendation: Example-only config; not a protocol mandate. Note as reference-only stack assumption.
